name: Wobble Card
summary: A card component that tilts and translates based on mouse position with a subtle noise texture overlay.
detailedDescription: Wobble Card creates an interactive 3D-tilting card effect that responds to mouse movement. The component calculates mouse position relative to card center, dividing by 20 to create subtle offset values (typically ±10px range). On hover, the outer container translates to the calculated position while the inner content translates in the opposite direction and scales to 1.03, creating a parallax depth effect. The card features a radial gradient background (white at 50% opacity fading to transparent from top) with sophisticated multi-layer shadows for depth. A noise texture overlay (noise.webp at 30% size, 10% opacity) with radial mask adds analog film grain texture. Transform transitions use 0.1s ease-out for responsive following. The card has indigo-800 background with rounded-2xl corners and overflow-hidden clipping. Content is padded generously (py-20, px-4-10) for comfortable spacing. This creates a playful, tactile card interaction ideal for feature cards, testimonials, or any content that benefits from dimensional hover effects that feel physical and responsive.
purpose: Create 3D parallax tilt effect on mouse hover
Enhance cards with noise texture and depth
behavior: Calculates mouse offset from card center
Translates outer container toward mouse position
Scales inner content to 1.03 on hover
Applies noise texture overlay with radial mask
visualCharacteristics: Radial gradient from top (white to transparent)
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
